message:
fix: TypeScript strictness fixes for update system and vite config

- UpdateError: Use composition instead of parameter property for cause
- flywheel-update.ts: Use spread syntax for optional release property
- flywheel-update.ts: Add null checks for result variable
- flywheel.ts: Handle potentially undefined Bun version split result
- vite.config.ts: Use bracket notation for process.env access
- update-checker.service.ts: Remove duplicate export, fix log.debug call

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
